base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of transform_vfx — a effect_layer (spell_vfx) from 1997 castlevania symphony of night. Transform VFX + spell-casting animations + summon-familiar sprites + stone/poison/curse status-ailments. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Transform VFX + spell-casting animations + summon-familiar sprites + stone/poison/curse status-ailments
